description:
Auction.com is the nation's largest online real estate marketplace, which offers foreclosure and bank owned residential properties for sale. Learn from Auction.com how they created a cloud architecture for handling transaction reports in near real time, ensuring compliance with rigorous financial security standards through the adept utilization of Amazon Appflow, Glue, and Athena, among others.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture #analytics #AmazonAppFlow
fulltitle: Auction.com: Empower Business Users to Securely Retrieve Near Real Time Data
